title: tofu-nextcloud provider
description: Native OpenTofu/Terraform provider for Nextcloud installed state (occ core install/upgrade), config.php system config, app install/enable state, per-app config, and federation (federated sharing / trusted servers) over SSH + occ. Buildable baseline complete: compiles, unit tests pass, gofmt/vet clean, schemas + DESIGN.md done, device-apply logic present but only unit-tested via injected exec (no device ever contacted).

phases.title: Baseline provider (DONE)
phases.exit_criteria: go build/vet/test/gofmt green; resources register; imports to 0-diff by design; secrets write-only.

items.description: os/exec SSH client (key/cert only) + OCC wrapper over an injected Executor; occ runs as the web user.
Typed resources, manage-declared-only diff, import-to-0-diff, write-only admin/DB secrets.

phases.title: Federation (netbox-federation realization) (DONE)
phases.exit_criteria: nextcloud_trusted_server + nextcloud_federation_config express a FederationRealm (protocol nextcloud_federated_sharing) and its FederationPeers; pure occ builders + trusted-server-list parser table-driven-tested; go build/vet/test/gofmt green.

items.description: DONE: a federated Nextcloud peer in the `federation` app trusted-server list via occ federation:trusted-servers:add/remove/list. Idempotent create (list-then-add), URL normalization (trailing-slash tolerant) for stable matching, import to 0-diff by URL, RequiresReplace on url. Realizes a netbox-federation FederationPeer.

DONE: federated-sharing toggles via occ config:app:set files_sharing (outgoing/incoming server2server, outgoing group share, auto-accept from trusted) + Global Scale lookup server (config:system lookup_server + lookupServerUploadEnabled). Manage-declared-only (null attr untouched); yes/no vs 1/0 bool encoding per key. Realizes the sharing side of a netbox-federation FederationRealm.

DONE: internal/nextcloud/federation.go holds trusted-server arg builders, three-shape trusted-server-list JSON parser (parseTrustedServers), FederationBoolValue/ParseFederationBool, NormalizeServerURL, TrustedServerPresent — all table-driven unit-tested; OCC methods exercised via injected fake exec.

phases.title: Lab-twin federation drill (verification owed)
phases.exit_criteria: Trusted-server add/remove/list and the federated-sharing toggles are proven end-to-end on a lab Nextcloud twin through dev-netbox -> dev-semaphore, at 0-diff on re-apply, with the exact `federation` app occ subcommand/key spellings confirmed against the live occ.

items.description: Stand up a lab Nextcloud install reachable by the runner over SSH (key/cert), federation app enabled; snapshot before the drill.

Confirm the live `federation` app occ subcommand names + list JSON shape (federation:trusted-servers:{add,remove,list} vs the install's actual command surface); adjust the arg builders / parser shapes if the twin differs.
Import an existing trusted peer + federated-sharing config and confirm a zero-diff re-plan; exercise add/remove and toggle drift detection.

phases.title: Consumer-layer wiring in tofu/
phases.exit_criteria: A tofu/ module maps netbox-federation FederationRealm/FederationPeer (protocol nextcloud_federated_sharing) -> these resources, driven by prod-semaphore.

items.description: Consumer module reads the Nextcloud FederationRealm (its ServiceInstance docroot/url + sharing toggles) and its FederationPeers (peer URLs + trust level) from NetBox and maps them to nextcloud_federation_config + nextcloud_trusted_server.
